details: Long run, negative split second half if feeling good. First week back, ease into pace if legs feel off.
Kettlebell swings 4x15, Medicine ball slams 4x10, Jump squats 3x8, Push press 3x8, Dead bug 3x10 each, Side plank 3x30s each, Cable woodchop 3x10 each
DB thrusters 4x10, Renegade rows 3x8 each, Jump lunges 3x10 each, DB swings 4x15, Hollow hold 3x30s, Bicycle crunches 3x15 each
WU 2km easy. Main set 6x800m with 2min jog recovery. CD 1.5km easy.
Bench press 4x5, Weighted pull-ups 4x6, Standing overhead press 3x8, Barbell row 3x8, Weighted dips 3x8, Face pulls 3x15, Hanging leg raises 3x10, Pallof press 3x12 each
Weighted push-ups 4x10-15, Pull-ups 4xmax, DB single-arm row 3x10 each, DB overhead press 3x12, Close-grip push-ups 3x12, Plank 3x45s, Side plank 3x30s each
Conversational pace, no watch pressure.
Box jumps 4x5, Tempo pause squat 4x5, Trap bar jump squats 3x4, Bulgarian split squat 3x8 each, Romanian deadlift 3x8, Broad jumps 3x5, Weighted plank 3x30-45s, Anti-rotation cable press 3x10 each

Weighted jump squats 4x8, Bulgarian split squat holding DBs 3x8 each, Single-leg RDL with DB 3x8 each, Broad jumps 3x5, Lateral bounds 3x6 each, Weighted Russian twists 3x15 each, Weighted sit-ups 3x12
Hip flexor stretch, pigeon pose, glute activation, 15min
